claims.summary: Fallback length should expand for real complexity without treating extra sentences as a target.
claims.disposition: verify fallback_continuity_budget_v1 gives a bounded three-to-five maximum and ordinary compact defaults

claims.summary: distinguishability_loss should describe clarity and edge definition, not pressure or slope drag.
claims.disposition: verify the provider hard rule, selector, scoring, and focused tests

claims.summary: The fallback fire drill could no longer read the contract after llm.rs was split into provider modules.
claims.disposition: update the drill to read the canonical provider configuration source and add a regression

claims.summary: Current fixtures should preserve clarity and allow high-entropy complexity within the cap.
claims.disposition: observe clarity preservation, a five-sentence high-entropy case, and no fixture execution errors
